query:
CREATE TABLE `ml_categories` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `mlCategoryId` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `parentId` varchar(32),
  `pathFromRoot` text,
  `pathIds` text,
  `totalItems` int DEFAULT 0,
  `hasChildren` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `isLeaf` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `picture` varchar(1024),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `ml_categories_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `ml_categories_mlCategoryId_unique` UNIQUE(`mlCategoryId`)
);
CREATE INDEX `idx_ml_categories_parent` ON `ml_categories` (`parentId`);
CREATE INDEX `idx_ml_categories_name` ON `ml_categories` (`name`);
CREATE INDEX `idx_ml_categories_leaf` ON `ml_categories` (`isLeaf`);
